zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Cantilupe於大約1242年出生在英國維爾爾卡爾內時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny22歲，母親Eva de Braose15歲。她於大約1261年與Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年6月在英國維爾爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂聖 米可艾爾也斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Cantilupe was born about 1242, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, was 22 and her mother, Eva de Braose, was 15. She married Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings about 1261, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died in June 1271, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Cantilupe est née environ 1242, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eva de Braose, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings environ 1261, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1271, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwi: St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Cantilupe um 1242 in Calne, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny 22 und ihre Mutter Eva de Braose 15. Sie hat um 1261 in England Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1271 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wiltshire, England und wurde in St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Cantilupe è nata il circa 1242 nel Calne, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Eva de Braose, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings circa 1261, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1271, nel Wiltshire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Cantilupeが約1242年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavennyは22歳，母Eva de Braoseは15歳であった。約1261年にイギリスでHenry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年6月にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリースト ミチャエル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwi: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 스트 믹하얼'스 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Cantilupe(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Braose(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1261년 영국에서 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 6월 영국 윌츠히르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 스트 믹하얼'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Cantilupe nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Braose, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings aproximadamente 1261, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1271, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwi: ст мачаел'с кэтедраль, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Cantilupe родилась около 1242 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eva de Braose, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings около 1261 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1271 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел'с кэтедраль, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane de Cantilupe nació aproximadamente 1242, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eva de Braose, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings aproximadamente 1261, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en junio de 1271, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en St Michael's Cathedral, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
